parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_messages,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status='ok' THEN 1 END) as success_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN status='ok' THEN 1 END)::numeric/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)*100,1) as success_rate,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd),0),4) as total_cost_usd,
  ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(latency_ms),0)) as avg_latency_ms,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as unique_users
FROM inbox_log
WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as audit_events,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN event_type='WEBHOOK_REJECTED' THEN 1 END) as rejected,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN event_type='HITL_REQUIRED' THEN 1 END) as hitl_count
FROM audit_log
WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as dlq_pending,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status='quarantined' THEN 1 END) as quarantined
FROM failed_tasks_db
WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

parameters.columns: level, workflow_id, node_name, message, context, logged_at
parameters.values: ='INFO', 'WF_L8', 'Daily Monitor', 'Daily KPI report sent', '{{ JSON.stringify({slo_pass: $json.slo_pass, cost: $('Query — Inbox KPIs').item.json.total_cost_usd, success_rate: $('Query — Inbox KPIs').item.json.success_rate}) }}'::jsonb, NOW()
